entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A grain legume that is intrinsically salt sensitive and exhibits genetic variation in salinity tolerance

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: A major environmental constraint for chickpea production

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of chickpea cultivars in saline conditions

entities.name: MULTI-LOCATION PHYSIOLOGICAL SCREENING
entities.description: A process used to identify salt tolerant and sensitive chickpea cultivars

entities.name: JG 11
entities.description: A salt tolerant cultivar of chickpea

entities.name: ICCV 2
entities.description: A salt sensitive cultivar of chickpea

entities.name: SALT STRESS
entities.description: The application of salt to evaluate physiological and transcriptional responses in plants

entities.name: RNA-SEQ
entities.description: A sequencing technique used to identify differentially expressed genes from root tissues

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes that show significant changes in expression levels in response to salt stress

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE
entities.description: The growth stage of the plant showing a high number of differentially expressed genes

entities.name: CATIONIC PEROXIDASE
entities.description: A gene significantly up-regulated in salt tolerant chickpea genotypes

entities.name: ASPARTIC ASE
entities.description: A gene significantly up-regulated in salt tolerant chickpea genotypes

entities.name: NRT1/PTR
entities.description: A gene significantly up-regulated in salt tolerant chickpea genotypes

entities.name: PHOSPHATIDYLINOSITOL PHOSPHATE KINASE
entities.description: A gene significantly up-regulated in salt tolerant chickpea genotypes

entities.name: DREB1E
entities.description: A gene significantly up-regulated in salt tolerant chickpea genotypes

entities.name: ERF
entities.description: A gene significantly up-regulated in salt tolerant chickpea genotypes involved in phytohormonal cross-talk

entities.name: CELL WALL MODIFICATION
entities.description: A biological process involving genes that potentially confer salt tolerance

entities.name: ROOT MORPHOGENESIS
entities.description: A biological process involving genes that potentially confer salt tolerance

entities.name: DIRIGENT PROTEINS
entities.description: Genes involved in cell wall modification and root morphogenesis

entities.name: EXPANSIN
entities.description: Genes involved in cell wall modification and root morphogenesis

entities.name: CASPARIAN STRIP MEMBRANE PROTEINS
entities.description: Genes involved in cell wall modification and root morphogenesis

entities.name: SALT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and yield under saline conditions

entities.name: PHYTOHORMONAL CROSS-TALK
entities.description: Interaction between different plant hormones, specifically between ERF and PIN-FORMED genes

entities.name: PIN-FORMED
entities.description: Genes that modulate root growth through phytohormonal cross-talk with ERF

entities.name: ROOT GROWTH
entities.description: The development and expansion of the root system modulated by ERF and PIN-FORMED genes

entities.name: GENE SET ENRICHMENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A computational method used to identify potential candidates for improving salt tolerance

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL ANNOTATION
entities.description: A process of assigning biological functions to genes to identify candidates for salt tolerance
